ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity class */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_entity_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_class_id") REFERENCES entity_classes ("entity_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_classes" (
  "entity_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity class */,
  "entity_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity class */,
  "entity_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity class was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the entity class */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the entity class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_classes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_classes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_definition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter definition */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., string, number) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_parameter_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_definition_id") REFERENCES parameter_definitions ("parameter_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_definitions" (
  "parameter_definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter definition */,
  "parameter_definition_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter definition */,
  "parameter_definition_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter definition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter definition was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter definition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_definitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_definitions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., string, number) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "value_numeric" TEXT /* Numeric value of the parameter (for numeric data types) */,
  "value_string" TEXT /* String value of the parameter (for string data types) */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit that created this parameter value */,
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alternative version of this parameter value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter value was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., initial, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commit was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternatives" (
  "alternative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., string, number) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter in this alternative version */,
  "value_numeric" TEXT /* Numeric value of the parameter in this alternative version (for numeric data types) */,
  "value_string" TEXT /* String value of the parameter in this alternative version (for string data types) */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit that created this alternative version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alternative version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alternative version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the alternative version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the alternative version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alternative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternatives_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternatives_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternatives_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternatives_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternatives_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
